content_markdown:
# "The Armor of God"
## Scripture
"Put on the whole armor of God, that you may be able to stand against the schemes of the devil." – Ephesians 6:11
## Reflection
As men, we often find ourselves facing battles in our personal and professional lives. The enemy is relentless, seeking to undermine our faith and our relationships. But we are not defenseless. In Ephesians 6:11, the Apostle Paul reminds us to put on the whole armor of God. This armor is not just a physical representation, but a spiritual one as well. It includes the belt of truth, the breastplate of righteousness, shoes for the ready to preach the gospel, and a shield of faith. We must remember that our faith is not just something we practice, but something we put on daily. We must clothe ourselves with the armor of God, that we may be able to stand against the schemes of the enemy and fight the good fight of faith.

## Daily Challenge
"Do 25 squats while declaring your faith in the power of God's armor."
